name: Walnut Hermits
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large bowl, blend together shortening or butter and brown sugar. Beat in eggs. Stir in flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Add spices. Stir in sour cream, then add walnuts, raisins, and dates. Stir well. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet. Bake 12 to 15 minutes. Yield: 6 dozen.
